name: agentspec_validate
description: Validate an agent manifest against the AgentSpec schema. Returns validity, name, version, content hash, and any errors.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');from agentspec.parser.manifest import AgentManifest;from agentspec.parser.loader import agent_hash;d=json.load(sys.stdin);m=AgentManifest(**d['manifest']);h=agent_hash(m);print(json.dumps({'valid':True,'name':m.name,'version':m.version,'hash':h,'errors':[]}))
